scale.price: text-lg sm:text-xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900 font-display

grid.products: grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-3 sm:gap-4 lg:gap-6

header.layout: Sticky top, z-50, bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-100 py-3
header.elements: Asymmetric layout: Left features Location Pill ('Delivery to Home - 10 MIN' badge). Center/Bottom dominates with Universal Search. Right has i18n toggle and Profile.

delivery_pill.style: Inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm font-bold bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg
delivery_pill.badge: bg-[#E4002B] text-white text-[10px] uppercase px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md

category_tile.style: Rounded-xl overflow-hidden cursor-pointer transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 relative h-28 sm:h-32
category_tile.image: Absolute bottom-0 right-0 w-[70%] h-auto object-contain drop-shadow-md
category_tile.text: Absolute top-2 left-2 right-2 font-semibold text-sm text-gray-800 leading-tight

product_card.style: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-xl p-3 flex flex-col gap-2 relative shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-md transition-shadow h-full
product_card.discount_chip: Absolute top-0 left-0 bg-green-600 text-white text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-br-lg rounded-tl-xl z-10
product_card.image_container: w-full aspect-square relative mb-2 flex items-center justify-center p-2
product_card.time_pill: flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] font-medium bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md w-max mt-1
product_card.add_button: w-full bg-[#E4002B]/10 text-[#E4002B] border border-[#E4002B] rounded-lg py-1.5 font-bold text-sm hover:bg-[#E4002B] hover:text-white transition-colors flex justify-center items-center h-9
product_card.stepper: flex justify-between items-center bg-[#E4002B] text-white rounded-lg h-9 px-2 font-bold text-sm

cart_drawer.style: Fixed right-0 top-0 h-full w-full max-w-md bg-white shadow-2xl border-l border-gray-100 z-[100] flex flex-col
cart_drawer.header: p-4 border-b border-gray-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-white
cart_drawer.body: flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 bg-gray-50 flex flex-col gap-3

sticky_bottom_cart.style: Fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-white border-t border-gray-200 p-3 md:hidden shadow-[0_-4px_6px_-1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
sticky_bottom_cart.content: Flex between. Left: Item count & total price in bold. Right: 'View Cart' button (bg-[#E4002B] text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-bold)

checkout_stepper.style: Clean white background, clear typography, prominent order summary. Support for UPI-QR proof upload and COD.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (dark slate or crisp white), dense Shadcn UI tables for OMS and Catalog
admin_dashboard.colors: Neutral grays with primary red for key actions only. No over-usage of red.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.

internationalization.notes: Include a toggle in the header for English/Hindi switching. Design UI components flexible enough to handle Hindi text expansion.

media.guidelines: Use these precise URLs for implementation. Duplicate products with varying details (name, price) to populate ~30 catalog items.
